<?php declare(strict_types = 1); /* * This file is part of PharIo\Manifest. * * Copyright (c) Arne Blankerts <arne@blankerts.de>, Sebastian Heuer <sebastian@phpeople.de>, Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> and contributors * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * */ namespace PharIo\Manifest; class PhpElement extends ManifestElement { public function getVersion(): string { return $this->getAttributeValue('version'); } public function hasExtElements(): bool { return $this->hasChild('ext'); } public function getExtElements(): ExtElementCollection { return new ExtElementCollection( $this->getChildrenByName('ext') ); } }
